footer.copyright: © 2026 Twinspire Neural Solutions · All rights reserved
footer.disclaimer: Twinspire is a decision support platform and is not intended to diagnose or treat medical conditions.

hero.subtitle: One in five footballers tears the same muscle twice. Not from bad luck, but from missed signals. Twinspire reads every one of them.

about.headline: This Started With One Injury. Then a Second.
about.p1: Pouya was a professional footballer. He did everything right. Full rehab, clinical clearance, gradual return.
about.p2: Eight weeks later, he tore the same hamstring again.
about.p3: The warning signs were there. The process couldn't see them. He went back to DTU to build what didn't exist. Twinspire is the result.
about.imageAlt: Pouya on the football pitch wearing an orange training bib

team.heading: Built by People Who've Been on the Treatment Table

builtFor.heading: For Everyone Who Refuses to Lose a Player to a Preventable Injury.

footballers.title: Footballers
footballers.description: Your body has been generating data your whole career. Most of it has disappeared. Twinspire gives it back and makes sure it follows you wherever you go.

coaches.title: Coaches & Performance Staff
coaches.description: Know your squad's true readiness before you set the lineup. Neuromuscular load and recovery signals, including data your athletes generate on their own time.

physio.title: Physiotherapists
physio.description: Get unified objective deviation alerts, recovery signals, and recommended actions from every data source.

science.heading: This Is Not a Dashboard. It Is a Model.
science.body: Most platforms count load. Twinspire understands response. The methodology fuses wearables, EMG, and biomechanics into a living physiological model, unique to every athlete. Patent-pending. Validated on real data. Built to be right before it's used.

trust.heading: The Data Belongs to the Athlete. Full Stop.
trust.body: GDPR-compliant. EU servers. Never sold. Never shared. The passport belongs to the athlete. The squad data belongs to the club. We host it — we don't own it.
trust.disclaimer: Twinspire is a decision support platform and is not intended to diagnose or treat medical conditions.

product.headline1: Every Athlete Has a Pattern. We Find It.
product.p1: Twinspire builds a continuously updated model of each player by drawing on GPS, strength output, physio notes, neuromuscular sensor data, and the athlete's own wearables, including data from away from the training ground. It learns what normal looks like for that body. Then it tells you when something shifts.
product.p2: Every session, every load, every injury is logged, structured, and portable. When a player moves clubs, their full history moves with them.
product.mockupAlt: Twinspire staff dashboard and player mobile app showing simulation parameters and readiness metrics

problem.headline: You're Making Sunday's Decision with Tuesday's Data.
problem.p1: GPS in one system. Strength tests in another. Gym sessions, extra runs, wearable data that never leaves the player's phone. The full picture has never been in one place. Not because of how the staff works, but because of how the tools are built.
problem.p2: 30% of injuries are rehab-related. The reinjury rate hasn't moved in a decade. The tools haven't caught up.

cta.title: Your Squad Is Telling You Something. Are You Hearing It?
cta.subtitle: We are onboarding founding partners across the Nordics this quarter. The clubs that join now shape the product, get priority access, and lock in preferred pricing.
cta.stats: 71 athletes. 2 active clubs. 18 months of real data.

partners.heading: Build the Future of Football Health With Us.
partners.body: We work with sensor providers, clinics, and research institutions pushing the boundaries of performance and rehabilitation. If your work belongs in the stack — let's talk.

contact.title: The Reinjury Rate Hasn't Moved in a Decade. Let's Change That.
